## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that would help.
